TEXT.Text: Ping Mao
Share EXP
This is Mine
We are Together
Power of the Lion
Lucky Punch
Iron man
Teeth of the Lion
Gold Rush
Heavy Rush
Roar of the Lion
Potion Increase
Fire ball
Poison Cloud
Wheel Wind
Dark Cloud
Torso Smash
Bonus EXP for mission reward
Auto attack
Launch on Riding Pet
Riding Pet attack
Taurine Support
Call Teleport Menu
Decrease Teleport Cost
Teleport cost free
Pet gains 10% of user's EXP
Pet gathers 2 items in an 80 radius. Varies with grade.
Pet gathers 3 items in a 120 radius. Varies with grade.
Pet gathers 5 items in a 150 radius. Varies with grade.
Pet gathers 7 items in a 180 radius. Varies with grade.
Pet gathers 10 items in a 200 radius. Varies with grade.
User gains 10% of Pet's EXP. Varies with grade.
User gains 20% of Pet's EXP. Varies with grade.
User gains 30% of Pet's EXP. Varies with grade.
User gains 40% of Pet's EXP. Varies with grade.
User gains 50% of Pet's EXP. Varies with grade.
User's physical attack increased by 50. Varies with grade.
User's physical attack increased by 70. Varies with grade.
User's physical attack increased by 90. Varies with grade.
User's physical attack increased by 120. Varies with grade.
User's physical attack increased by 150. Varies with grade.
Activates a buff which increases gold drops. For 5 minutes, amount of gold dropped is increased by 20%, and gold drop rate is increased by 3%.
Activates a buff which increases gold drops. For 5 minutes, amount of gold dropped is increased by 40%, and gold drop rate is increased by 4%.
Activates a buff which increases gold drops. For 5 minutes, amount of gold dropped is increased by 60%, and gold drop rate is increased by 5%.
Activates a buff which increases gold drops. For 5 minutes, amount of gold dropped is increased by 80%, and gold drop rate is increased by 7%.
Activates a buff which increases gold drops. For 5 minutes, amount of gold dropped is increased by 100%, and gold drop rate is increased by 10%.
Activates a buff which increases user's physical defence. Physical defence will be increased 5% for 5 minutes
Activates a buff which increases user's physical defence. Physical defence will be increased 7% for 5 minutes
Activates a buff which increases user's physical defence. Physical defence increased by 9% for 5 minutes
Activates a buff which increases user's physical defence. Physical defence increased by 12% for 5 minutes
Activates a buff which increases user's physical defence. Physical defence increased by 15% for 5 minutes
Activates a buff which increases user's critical damage. Critical damage increased by 5% for 5 minutes.
Activates a buff which increases user's critical damage. Critical damage increased by 7% for 5 minutes.
Activates a buff which increases user's critical damage. Critical damage increased by 9% for 5 minutes.
Activates a buff which increases user's critical damage. Critical damage increased by 12% for 5 minutes.
Activates a buff which increases user's critical damage. Critical damage increased by 15% for 5 minutes.
Pet will dash forward, hitting monsters and making them drop gold. 2 monsters attacked, monsters will drop 1-4 silver randomly.
Pet will dash forward, hitting monsters and making them drop gold. 4 monsters attacked, monsters will drop 2-6 silver randomly.
Pet will dash forward, hitting monsters and making them drop gold. 6 monsters attacked, monsters will drop 3-8 silver randomly.
Pet will dash forward, hitting monsters and making them drop gold. 8 monsters attacked, monsters will drop 4-10 silver randomly.
Pet will dash forward, hitting monsters and making them drop gold. 10 monsters attacked, monsters will drop 5-12 silver randomly.
Pet rushes forward, debuffing monsters. Hits up to 2 monsters, inflicting a level 6 slow debuff.
Pet rushes forward, debuffing monsters. Hits up to 4 monsters, inflicting a level 7 slow debuff.
Pet rushes forward, debuffing monsters. Hits up to 6 monsters, inflicting a level 8 slow debuff.
Pet rushes forward, debuffing monsters. Hits up to 8 monsters, inflicting a level 9 slow debuff.
Pet rushes forward, debuffing monsters. Hits up to 10 monsters, inflicting a level 10 slow debuff.
Pet releases a mighty roar, debuffing nearby monsters. 2 monsters in an 80 radius receive a level 1 stun.
Pet releases a mighty roar, debuffing nearby monsters. 4 monsters in a 90 radius receive a level 2 stun.
Pet releases a mighty roar, debuffing nearby monsters. 6 monsters in a 100 radius receive a level 3 stun.
Pet releases a mighty roar, debuffing nearby monsters. 8 monsters in a 120 radius receive a level 4 stun.
Pet releases a mighty roar, debuffing nearby monsters. 10 monsters in a 160 radius receive a level 5 stun.
User's HP/MP regenerates by 50 points every 10 seconds
User's HP/MP regenerates by 100 points every 15 seconds
User's HP/MP regenerates by 150 points every 20 seconds
User's HP/MP regenerates by 200 points every 25 seconds
User's HP/MP regenerates by 250 points every 30 seconds
HP/MP regeneration increased by 5%.
HP/MP regeneration increased by 7.5%.
HP/MP regeneration increased by 10%.
HP/MP regeneration increased by 12.5%.
HP/MP regeneration increased by 15%.
Attacks monsters with lightning. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with lightning. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with lightning. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with lightning. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with lightning. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a Fireball. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a Fireball. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a Fireball. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a Fireball. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a Fireball. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a vicious Bite. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a vicious Bite. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a vicious Bite. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a vicious Bite. Power increases with level.
Attacks monsters with a vicious Bite. Power increases with level.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 16 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 17 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 18 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 19 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 20 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 16 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 17 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 18 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 19 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 20 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 16 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 17 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 18 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 19 Intoxication debuff.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 20 Intoxication debuff.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 3 monsters.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 5 monsters.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 7 monsters.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 9 monsters.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 12 monsters.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 3 monsters.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 5 monsters.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 7 monsters.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 9 monsters.
A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 12 monsters.

A spinning 2-hit combo that attacks up to 12 monsters.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 6 Stun.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 7 Stun.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 8 Stun.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 9 Stun.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 10 Stun.

Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 8 Stun.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 9 Stun.
Damages up to 10 monsters in a certain radius with a level 10 Stun.
Pet rushes towards 1 monster in range with a vicious torso attack.
Pet rushes towards 2 monsters in range with a vicious torso attack.
Pet rushes towards 3 monster in range with a vicious torso attack.
Pet rushes towards 4 monsters in range with a vicious torso attack.
Pet rushes towards 5 monster in range with a vicious torso attack.
Pet rushes towards 1 monster in range with a vicious torso attack.

Pet rushes towards 4 monsters in range with a vicious torso attack.
Pet rushes towards 5 monster in range with a vicious torso attack.
Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 10 Freezing debuff.
Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 11 Freezing debuff.
Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 12 Freezing debuff.
Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 13 Freezing debuff.
Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 14 Freezing debuff.
Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 10 Freezing debuff.
Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 11 Freezing debuff.

Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 14 Freezing debuff.

Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 12 Freezing debuff.
Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 13 Freezing debuff.
Summons ice crystals to damage up to 10 monsters with level 14 Freezing debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 10 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 11 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 12 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 13 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 14 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 10 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 11 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 12 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 13 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 14 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 10 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 11 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 12 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 13 Burn debuff.
Summons a meteor to damage up to 10 monsters in a certain range with a level 14 Burn debuff.
User's mission map reward bonus EXP will be increased by 10%.
This is an automatic attack order with a toggle button. If this is activated, your pet will attack monsters using learned skills. Pet will use mainly low mana costing skills.
This button is for mounting, dismounting a pet. Movement speed will be increased. While in mounted status, cannot attack.
While on a riding pet, this skill can be cast by hitting the normal attack key (X). ATTK/MATK depends on the riding pet's level.
While on a riding pet, this skill can be cast by hitting the normal attack key (X). ATTK/MATK and number of launches depends on the riding pet's level.
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 500
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 1000
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 1500
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 2000
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 2500
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 3000
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 3500
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 4000
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 4500
Gained Taurine Support effect from pet, the pet owner's HP recovers by 5000
This skill can only be used while riding a pet. Warp tower's menu can be called anywhere. Cost will vary according in accordance with pets.
Warp tower's cost will be decreased by 30%!!
Warp tower's cost will be FREE!!!

Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 5%.
Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 7%.
Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 9%.
Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 12%.
Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 15%.
Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 20%.
Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 25%.
Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 30%.
Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 35%.
Phy/Mag attack power of your pet will be increased by 40%.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 15%, and monsters lose 15 HP per second.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 20%, and monsters lose 25 HP per second.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 25%, and monsters lose 35 HP per second.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 30%, and monsters lose 45 HP per second.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 35%, and monsters lose 55 HP per second.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 40%, and monsters lose 65 HP per second.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 45%, and monsters lose 75 HP per second.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 50%, and monsters lose 85 HP per second.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 55%, and monsters lose 100 HP per second.
Movement/Attack speed of monsters around the Cloud will be decreased by 60%, and monsters lose 125 HP per second.
Pet will fire 3 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
Pet will fire 4 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
Pet will fire 5 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
Pet will fire 6 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
Pet will fire 7 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
Pet will fire 8 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
Pet will fire 9 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
Pet will fire 10 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
Pet will fire 11 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
Pet will fire 12 Thorns, damaging enemies stood ahead of your pet.
The skill will activate after 3 hours of play time.

Fire Hurricane
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -7% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 8 and 7.
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -10% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 13 and 12.
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -13% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 18 and 17.
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -16% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 23 and 22.
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -19% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 28 and 27.
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -22% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 33 and 32.
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -25% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 38 and 37.
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -28% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 42 and 42.
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -32% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 52 and 52.
Monsters near the Fire Cloud lose -35% of their overall HP. HP and MP continuously decrease by 62 and 62.
3 hurricanes move forwards towards the enemy dealing damage.
4 hurricanes move forwards towards the enemy dealing damage.
5 hurricanes move forwards towards the enemy dealing damage.
6 hurricanes move forwards towards the enemy dealing damage.
7 hurricanes move forwards towards the enemy dealing damage.
8 hurricanes move forwards towards the enemy dealing damage.
9 hurricanes move forwards towards the enemy dealing damage.
10 hurricanes move forwards towards the enemy dealing damage.
11 hurricanes move forwards towards the enemy dealing damage.

Stun the monsters.
Sabertooth is a beast of great strength and will. This one's as cute as a button though! - Pet Dye Potion can be used

This Egg contains a Sabertooth riding and fighting Pet. - 7 day use period - Can be revived with Premium Pet Food after expiration of use period - Can grant stat bonuses - Can be sold and traded - Pet Dye Potion can be used
Half Tiger half Lion, the new King of the jungle has come to town and he's just as cute! - Pet Dye Potion can be used

This Egg contains a Leoris riding and fighting Pet. - 7 day use period - Can be revived with Premium Pet Food after expiration of use period - Can grant stat bonuses - Can be sold and traded - Pet Dye Potion can be used
Bite Off
Attack that rushes forward to enemy.
Playful Raccoony will keep you busy.
Raccoony Pet Egg
A playful Raccoony hatches from this egg.
Roggy, are you from outer space?
Roggy Pet Egg
Roggy will hatch from this egg
Mong Mong
How many tentacles do you have?
Mong Mong Pet Egg
Mong Mong hatches from this egg.
Leaf Oinky
Joyful Leaf Oinky loves to play with the leaf on his head.
Leaf Oinky
Leaf Oinky hatches from this egg.
Ooops! Careful, you may burn yourself.
Faya Pet Egg
Faya hatches from this egg.
I think I once met Deviruchi in RO.
Deviruchi Egg

This Egg contains a Deviruchi fighting Pet. - 7 day use period - Can be revived with Premium Pet Food after expiration of use period - Can grant stat bonuses - Pet Dye Potion cannot be used - Can be sold only
Deviruchi Egg
Deviruchi Egg
Have you heard of Sohee's popularity in Ragnarök?
Sohee Egg

This Egg contains a Sohee fighting Pet. - 7 day use period - Can be revived with Premium Pet Food after expiration of use period - Can grant stat bonuses - Pet Dye Potion cannot be used - Can be sold only
Sohee Egg
Sohee Egg
Mong Mong
Leaf Oinky
This legendary wyvern of the shadows will test the fellowship before deciding on its master.

This Egg contains a Nightshade Skyre riding and fighting Pet. - 7 day use period - Can be revived with Premium Pet Food after expiration of use period - Can grant stat bonuses - Can be sold only - Pet Dye Potion can't be used

Cute Mini Red car.

This Egg contains a Mini Red Riding Pet. - 7 day use period - Can be revived with Premium Pet Food after expiration of use period - Can grant stat bonuses - Pet Dye Potion cannot be used - Can be sold
Yellow Cat has a chubby little tail.

This Egg contains a Yellow Cat riding Pet. - 7 day use period - Can be revived with Premium Pet Food after expiration of use period - Can grant stat bonuses - Pet Dye Potion cannot be used - Can be sold
Wild Green goes any rough course.

This Egg contains a Wild Green riding Pet. - 7 day use period - Can be revived with Premium Pet Food after expiration of use period - Can grant stat bonuses - Pet Dye Potion cannot be used - Can be sold
The Blue Thunder is brand-new super car.

This Egg contains a Blue Thunder riding Pet. - 7 day use period - Can be revived with Premium Pet Food after expiration of use period - Can grant stat bonuses - Pet Dye Potion cannot be used - Can be sold

Special animation that can be seen when default attack button (X key) when riding it. It doesn't have damage.
Shoots razor beam to front side.
Shoots explosive projectile grenade in a curved line to front side.
